attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.SAF_HEADER_ID, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.SAF_ID, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.SAF_TYPE, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.SAF_REASON, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.SAF_DATE, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.SAF_STATUS, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.SAF_AMOUNT, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.SPECIAL_REQUEST, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.EMAIL_ADDRESS, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.INITIATOR_ROLE_ID, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.INITIATOR_GROUP_ID, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.COLLECTOR_ID, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.COMMENTS, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.ITEM_KEY, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.CASH_RECEIPT_ID, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.ALERT_STATUS, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.ORG_ID, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.FUNC_SAF_AMOUNT, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.TRAN_CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.EXCHANGE_RATE, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.EXCHANGE_DATE, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.CREATED_BY, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.CREATION_DATE, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.PROCESSED_FLAG, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.D_ATTRIBUTE1 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL,
 (
 select SAF_HEADER_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL
 minus
 select SAF_HEADER_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.SAF_HEADER_ID = STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.SAF_HEADER_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$GGACML.CDC_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_ALL)
